news.t: Distillate Capital Continues to Build Its Innovative Value-Focused Lineup With the Launch of DSMC: The Distillate Small/Mid Cash Flow ETF

holdings.infoBox: DSMC is an equity ETF with a total of 152 individual holdings. The top holdings are Versant Media Group stock at 1.34%, Invesco at 1.20%, CDW Corporation at 1.16%, Toll Brothers at 1.11%, and Skyworks Solutions at 1.07%.

overview.description: The Distillate Small/Mid Cash Flow ETF (DSMC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in extended market equity. The fund is an actively managed portfolio of US mid- and small-cap stocks selected based on free cash flow yield. DSMC was launched on Oct 5, 2022 and is issued by Distillate.

data.title: Distillate Capital Continues to Build Its Innovative Value-Focused Lineup With the Launch of DSMC: The Distillate Small/Mid Cash Flow ETF
data.text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Distillate launches Small/Mid Cash Flow ETF DSMC, adds to lineup built on proprietary measures of quality, risk, value through lens of free cash flow
